arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Dortmund vs. Union Berlin
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Borussia Dortmund vs. Union Berlin.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Niko Kovac Seeks First BVB Home Win Against Union Berlin
arts.sum: To do it, Dortmund will need to defeat Union Berlin, a club that has been bad, but not quite relegation-bad... When Borussia Dortmund first hired Niko Kovac as head coach, his immediate job was to get BVB into the Champions League Round of 16 and stop the club’s bleeding in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Niko Kovac gets into semantic tussle with reporter over Daniel Svensson
arts.sum: BVB trainer Niko Kovac had an interesting response to one specific question at his Friday press conference.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: BVB Progress After Beating Sporting Lisbon in Champions League Playoffs
arts.sum: Given the stinkers Dortmund have often dropped this season, a competent, if not particularly exciting, performance that sees them through to the Round of 16 without incident is a start. Dortmund were wasteful in front of goal, with Serhou Guirassy even fluffing his lines from the penalty spot in the second half.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Union Berlin preview: BVB look to salvage season
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will look to rescue their faltering Bundesliga season when they welcome Union Berlin to Signal Iduna Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Hurting Celtic debriefed over a beer as Brendan Rodgers saw something in stars' eyes during Dortmund to Munich journey
arts.sum: The Hoops boss allowed his players to unwind with a beer back at base after Tuesday's Champions League heartache

arts.ttl: Forget Nico Williams! Jamie Gittens is Europe's HOTTEST young star
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens is the hottest young attacking prospect in European football, with Real Madrid the latest club to be linked with the Borussia Dortmund sensation.
